verdict.answer_first: A states the plan immediately: “I'll give you the recommended default path”; B also does, but with more setup: “Assumed baseline...”
verdict.decisiveness: A commits harder to a default: “recommended default path”; B surveys more variants and tools: “logical replication / dual-write + CDC.”
verdict.fabrication: A invents context: “You dismissed the questions”; B has unsupported precision: “~3× the effort.”
verdict.actionability: B is easier to execute because it phases the work and includes staging, backups, pooling, verification, cutover, and post-cutover monitoring.
